name: Fonticulua Fluctus
display_name: Fonticulua Fluctus — 100M with First Footfall, most expensive!
description: The most expensive exobiology species! Base ~20,000,000 cr, with first footfall ×5 = ~100,000,000 cr. Spawns only on ICY worlds with Neon/Argon atmosphere and very low temperature.
display_name_en: Fonticulua Fluctus — 100M with First Footfall, most expensive!
display_name_ru: Fonticulua Fluctus — 100M с FF, самый дорогой!
description_en: The most expensive exobiology species! Base ~20,000,000 cr, with first footfall ×5 = ~100,000,000 cr. Spawns only on ICY worlds with Neon/Argon atmosphere and very low temperature.
description_ru: Самый дорогой вид экзобиологии! База ~20,000,000 cr, с first footfall ×5 = ~100,000,000 cr. Спавнится только на ICY worlds с Neon/Argon атмосферой и очень низкой температурой.
